reason: venvman fallback warning does not name the venvman error: _run_venvman discards result.stderr before returning None, so the fallback message at init.py:262 is a fixed string with no error detail; spec requires the warning to NAME the venvman error, and the test only checks 'venvman' or 'fall' in output — not that the error text is surfaced.

criteria.detail: test_exit_1_when_no_marker confirmed; init_status() returns 1 when marker absent

criteria.criterion: kbu doctor prints one [PASS|FAIL|SKIP] line per probe
criteria.detail: 5 probes, each line starts with the correct token, confirmed by test and code

criteria.criterion: Test simulates non-Darwin without override, confirms exit 1 with v1 macOS-only message
Test confirms venvman invocation is exactly 'venvman create --project kbutillib --dir <path> --python 3.11'
Marker schema fields match exactly (version, initialized_at, kbutillib_repo_path, kbutillib_commit, venv_manager, venv_python, jupyter_kernel_name)
criteria.detail: All 7 fields present, version=1 (int), jupyter_kernel_name defaults to 'kbutillib'

criteria.criterion: init_status() exit codes: 0 (marker+venv ok), 1 (no marker), 2 (marker but venv gone)
criteria.detail: All three cases implemented and tested

criteria.criterion: Doctor probe order: marker → cursor → claude-extension → kbu-version → kernel-registered
criteria.detail: probes list in doctor_command matches exactly
_probe_claude_extension returns SKIP when shutil.which('cursor') is None; test confirmed

criteria.criterion: venvman fallback: on non-zero exit, falls back to python -m venv with warning NAMING the venvman error
criteria.detail: _run_venvman discards result.stderr on failure and returns None; _do_init emits a fixed 'Warning: venvman create failed' string without the error text; test only asserts 'venvman' or 'fall' in output, not the actual error

criteria.criterion: Full CLI test suite (~228 tests) still passes
Tests do not assume specific kernelspec installed; kernel-list checks are mocked
criteria.detail: All subprocess.run calls for jupyter kernelspec are monkeypatched

criteria.criterion: No actual subprocess/venv creation in tests
criteria.detail: subprocess.run, shutil.which, sys.platform all monkeypatched throughout
